work.title: mapping dissonance
work.shortDesc: Research fellowship exploring aural dissonance in natural landscapes.
work.fullDesc: A month long research residency focusing on mapping the sonic dissonance of natural environments. The project works with field recordings and folklores to spark an urgency of conservation.

work.title: hypnagōgos
work.shortDesc: Sleep concert series inspired by Carl Jung's dream psychology.
work.fullDesc: Hypnagōgos is an ongoing series of sleep concerts. Participants are invited to drift between wakefulness and sleep while immersed in generative ambient textures.

work.title: agents of malarkey
work.shortDesc: Interactive installation and performance art piece.
work.fullDesc: A collaborative exhibition investigating play and chaos theory through performances and radio artworks.

work.title: kibitzer
work.shortDesc: Sound installation looking into the chess history and culture of Kolkata.
work.fullDesc: Commissioned for the St+art India festival, this installation captures the ambient sounds of Kolkata's street chess culture, transforming the strategic silence and sudden outbursts of players into a rhythmic composition.

work.title: preamble
work.shortDesc: A 32-channel immersive performance, utilizing the 3D Sound Lab of the residency programme.
work.fullDesc: A 32-channel immersive performance created during the Sonic Writings & Soundings residency at Darmstadt Ferienkurse, with the guidance of facilitators and mentors AGF and Cedrik.

work.title: sonic writings & soundings
work.shortDesc: Experimental electronic music residency.
work.fullDesc: A residency programme at the Darmstadt Ferienkurse focused on experimental electronic music. During this period, the performance piece Preamble was created, utilising the 3D Sound Lab with the guidance of facilitators and mentors AGF and Cedrik.

work.title: algorave india: compilation one
work.shortDesc: Curated compilation of algorithmic art from India.
work.fullDesc: A landmark release featuring 20+ artists from the Indian live coding community.

work.title: where trees lament over our malarkey
work.shortDesc: Exhibition of archives and extended speculation under the Agents of Malarkey world.
work.fullDesc: An exhibition of archives and extended speculation under the ongoing Agents of Malarkey world, curated as part of the Travelling Plants exhibition by Goethe Institut / Max Mueller Bhavan at FICA, Delhi.

work.title: 7th orbit: generative generation
work.shortDesc: Curation of Algorave India's seven year anniversary.
work.fullDesc: Curated '7th Orbit: Generative Generation' for Algorave India's seven year anniversary with W.I.P Labs.

work.title: xxxi
work.shortDesc: A noisy musical composition exploring music production techniques.
work.fullDesc: A noisy musical composition restarting and continuing the practice of exploring music production techniques.

work.title: w.i.p alt.fest 2024
work.shortDesc: Festival curation and production of music, techart and dance performances.
work.fullDesc: Spearheaded festival curation and production of music, techart, and dance performances across multiple venues in Bangalore and Delhi. Also performed a live coding set at the Algorave edition of the festival.

work.fullDesc: A collaborative sound art project with Ravi Agarwal, exhibited at the Lahore Biennale Foundation, focusing on environmental themes.

work.shortDesc: Podcast exploring cognitive science and art.
work.fullDesc: A series of conversations with artists and scientists.

Screened at the International Film Festival of India (Goa), Chalachitram National Film Festival (Guwahati), International Documentary and Short Film Festival (Thiruvananthapuram), and the National Independent Documentary Film Festival.

about:
I am a sound artist and designer based in Delhi. My work integrates sound art, design, and technology. My practice focuses on listening to sounds from nature and immediate environments, and performing synthesized interpretations live with generative algorithms.

I consider listening as a means of conservation. My goal is to get people to pay more attention to the sounds around them, both natural noises and electronic sounds.

My skills include audio engineering, making electronic music, and planning art programs/events. I have worked on many team projects, showed my art internationally, and received recognition for my sound design work.
